quoteLast: Cecily Thorogood, still self-possessed, but no longer very prettily clad, was submerged in the chilly Atlantic up to her shoulders and clinging to the life-line of an upturned jolly-boat.
title: The Long Trick
author: Bartimeus, 1886-1967
